## Personalized recommendationsin every message.

*   Drive foot traffic with location based recommendations
*   Fuel upsells & cross-sells with personalized product suggestions
*   Nurture sales by surfacing the right content for every customer

## Increase impact, not effort.

*   Define recommendation logic in a no-code personalization builder
*   Reuse winning recommendations across templates, messages, and channels
*   Build dynamic content blocks for visual recommendations, deploy them in any message

## Higher open rates, less unsubscribes*.

*   Precisely target offers based on inventory, purchase metadata, subscription details, and more
*   Build segments effortlessly in a visual no-code UI
*   Keep user data clean and organized

* Catalog data in segmentation is currently in open beta. Limitations apply. Availability, pricing, and other limitations are subject to change.

## No technical resources,no problem.

*   Upload data via CSV, Shopify Integration, and more†
*   Activate your Data Warehouse business data via no-code ingestion
*   Manage business data in an intuitive and visual interface
